$comment: Layer A for TARIFF vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O2x). Generated weights span the PIC 9(5)V99 range with the small-value bias exercising the sub-dollar charges and the 50.00 BULK boundary; the zone-code table content is constant and checked on every case.
